---
title: "References"
listing:
  contents: "references/*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [title, date, description]
  feed: false
---

Papers, prior work, and external resources informing this project. Each
agent maintains its own references file at `references/<agent>.qmd` to
avoid merge conflicts on shared branches. The listing below auto-aggregates
all of them.
